nl_query: For each student who filed a revaluation request that was approved, show their name, original final marks, revaluation attempt total marks, the absolute difference, and whether the difference exceeds the board's configured deviation threshold.
failed_sql:
SELECT sc.name AS student_name, r.final_marks AS original_final_marks, ea_reval.total_marks AS revaluation_total_marks, ABS(r.final_marks - ea_reval.total_marks) AS variance, ep.deviation_threshold, CASE WHEN ABS(r.final_marks - ea_reval.total_marks) > ep.deviation_threshold THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS exceeds_threshold
FROM   revaluation_request rr
JOIN   answer_script       a  ON a.id  = rr.script_id
JOIN   student_cache       sc ON sc.id = a.student_id
JOIN   result             r  ON r.script_id = a.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt  ea_p ON ea_p.script_id = a.id AND ea_p.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' AND ea_p.status IN ('FROZEN', 'SUBMITTED') AND ea_p.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_attempt  ea_r ON ea_r.script_id = a.id AND ea_r.attempt_type = 'REVIEW' AND ea_r.status IN ('FROZEN', 'SUBMITTED') AND ea_r.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   script_assignment  sa_p ON sa_p.script_id = a.id AND sa_p.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' AND sa_p.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   script_assignment  sa_r ON sa_r.script_id = a.id AND sa_r.attempt_type = 'REVIEW' AND sa_r.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   board              b   ON b.id           = ea_p.board_id
CROSS  JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT ep2.deviation_threshold, ep2.review_required, ep2.third_eval_trigger
  FROM   evaluation_policy ep2
  WHERE  (ep2.board_id = ea_p.board_id)
     OR  (ep2.course_id = b.course_id AND ep2.board_id IS NULL)
     OR  (ep2.course_id IS NULL AND ep2.board_id IS NULL)
  ORDER  BY CASE WHEN ep2.board_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
                 WHEN ep2.course_id IS NOT NULL THEN 2
                 ELSE 3 END
  LIMIT  1
) ep
WHERE  rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
GROUP BY sc.name, r.final_marks, ea_reval.total_marks, ep.deviation_threshold, exceeds_threshold
ORDER BY variance DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'total_marks'. It exists in multiple tables (answer_script, evaluation_attempt). You must qualify it with a table alias.
